listings.title: 2 vintage Pedal Car Firetrucks
listings.body: 2 pedal cars for parts or restoral  Both work / can be ridden as is. the Mickey Mouse one is rough, but still restorable - I have the metal (chrome ) bumpers etc. the other one is solid - really just surface rust. $75 each or $125 for both.   CASH ONLY if not sold by June 1  I ill take them apart and Ebay the parts
